rationale_source: F1.PC × F4.PC interaction — both source-tuple capture AND callout injection on same input (A22 + D04 combined assertion)

postal_code_tuples.rationale: F1.PC captures both per A22 pattern.

postal_code_discrepancy_detected.rationale: F1.PC distinct-tuple count >1 → F4.PC callout triggered per R11-C M2.

must_include.rationale: ASSERTION-1 (F1.PC capture surface): first postal in callout.

must_not_include.rationale: ASSERTION-2 (F4.PC × R11-C M1): Snapshot Property Address row street-address-only.
